channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Johanna Leia: Profile of Amari Bailey’s Mother and Her Career Journey
item.description: Johanna Leia is the mum of basketball talent Amari Bailey and has carved her own path as a model, influencer, reality TV personality, and entrepreneur. Born on 19 February 1981 in the US, Johanna star...

item.title: Cyanide Fishing Threatens Marine Life and Coral Reefs in West Philippine Sea
item.description: The Philippine Navy recently seized bottles of cyanide from Chinese vessels near the BRP Sierra Madre at Ayungin Shoal in the West Philippine Sea, according to the National Security Council. Cyanide i...

item.title: Pakistan seeks urgent US-Iran negotiations before ceasefire expires
item.description: Islamabad has stepped up its diplomatic efforts to get the United States and Iran back to the negotiation table after the first round of talks hosted in Pakistan ended without any formal agreement. Ac...

item.title: Hungary Elects New Government, Ending Orban's Long Reign
item.description: Hungary has elected a new government, marking the end of Viktor Orbán's lengthy period as Prime Minister. The victory for Peter Magyar’s centre-right Tisza party has granted them a sweeping mandate, p...

item.title: US Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Could Disrupt Global Oil and Fertiliser Supplies
item.description: The US has announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following failed peace talks with Iran after the recent conflict with Israel. The strait is a critical maritime chokepoint, through which about ...

item.title: Philippines Reports Cyanide Dumping by Chinese Fishermen in Spratly Waters
item.description: The Philippines has accused Chinese fishermen of using cyanide in the waters around the Spratly Islands, specifically near Second Thomas Shoal, also known locally as Ayungin Shoal. The National Securi...

item.title: Edo Governor Encourages Youth Participation in Nigerian Army Recruitment
item.description: The Edo State Governor, Monday Okpebholo, don call on all eligible youths for Edo State make dem take advantage of the ongoing Nigerian Army 91 Regular Recruit Intake. According to statement wey come ...

item.title: Hangu Police Constable Killed, Four Injured in Attack During Polio Vaccination Security Duty
item.description: On Monday, a police constable was martyred and four other officers were injured in Hangu district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa while providing security for a nationwide polio vaccination campaign running fro...

item.title: UK households face £480 income loss as energy prices rise after US–Iran tensions
item.description: New analysis by the Resolution Foundation warns that the typical UK household is set to lose around £480 this year due to higher energy costs triggered by recent geopolitical tensions between the Unit...

item.title: FIA highlights crucial role of volunteers in Formula One events
item.description: A recent FIA report has brought attention to the substantial role of unpaid volunteers who make Formula One races possible. The study, using data from race organisers, revealed that an average of 838 ...

item.title: UCLA set to break WNBA draft record with multiple first-round picks following NCAA title win
item.description: UCLA’s women’s basketball team is on the verge of setting a new WNBA record after its dominant run to the NCAA championship. As many as five Bruins players could be selected in the first round, with s...

item.title: Eight rescued from floodwaters in Siha District, Kilimanjaro
item.description: The Tanzania Fire and Rescue Force in the Kilimanjaro Region successfully rescued eight individuals in Koboko South Village, Nasai Ward, after their homes were surrounded by floodwaters caused by heav...

item.title: How Global Coffee Partnerships Support Tanzanian Smallholder Farmers
item.description: For more than 25 years, International Coffee Partners (ICP) has been working in Tanzania to strengthen the coffee sector through long-term collaboration with smallholder farmers. The initiative brings...

item.title: Chery plans to increase European car production through partnerships
item.description: Chinese automaker Chery is planning to expand its car production footprint in Europe by collaborating with established carmakers, leveraging existing factories instead of building new plants. Speaking...

item.title: Apple explores multiple prototype designs for upcoming smart glasses
item.description: Apple is reportedly advancing its work on smart glasses by testing four distinct design prototypes, according to details reported by Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman and covered in TechCrunch. The company is s...

item.title: New Digital Module to Improve Procurement Transparency and Efficiency
item.description: Dodoma — The Public Procurement Appeals Authority (PPAA) in Tanzania has introduced a new digital module under the NeST system that is expected to greatly improve accountability, transparency and effi...

item.title: Geo-tagging Nigeria's POS Terminals: Balancing Security with Agent Livelihoods
item.description: This article yarns about the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) new move wey dem announce on August 25, 2025—mandatory geo-tagging of Point-of-Sale (POS) terminals. The aim be to make transactions more tra...

item.title: Weekly Highlights from Moss & Fog: Art, History, and Space Exploration
item.description: The latest edition of 'Fog Signals' from Moss & Fog covers the most compelling stories from April 6 to April 12, 2026, offering a diverse look at art, history, and science. The issue features a fascin...

item.title: Hoërskool Vryburg mourns three pupils killed in road accident involving school transport
item.description: Hoërskool Vryburg has announced the death of a third learner following a tragic road accident that took place last Wednesday. The crash involved four learners travelling from Delareyville to school at...

item.title: Cape Town Courts Deal with Surge in Gang-Related Criminal Cases
item.description: Cape Town courts are bracing for a significant caseload this week as investigations into recent gang-related violence in the Western Cape escalate. Following a shooting incident in Valhalla Park, Bish...
